title: cyperus enervis
intro: Cyperus enervis is a plant species commonly known as umbrella sedge, a type of sedge that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyperus enervis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to relieve respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
